## About Sastre Consulting

[https://sastreconsulting.com](https://sastreconsulting.com/)

Sastre is a political risk, business intelligence, and corporate investigations consultancy. We work with a new generation of political and business intelligence professionals, uniting real local knowledge with top-of-the-market experience.
